case_title: DOUGLAS H. PARK VS. ANDY PSARRAS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, DOUGLAS H. AS TO DEFENDANT PSARRAS, ANDY AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SEAL ROCK INN RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
